docTitle: Baibel long Map · Baibel long Wanpela Skrol
metaDesc: Bihainim taimlain bilong Olpela Testamen, laip bilong Jisas, na ol wokabaut bilong Pol long wanpela trupela map — Baibel i bin kamap long ol trupela ples.

s.kicker: Baibel long Wanpela Skrol · Ol Map
s.title: Baibel long Map
s.verse: “Mipela i tokim yupela pinis long strong bilong Bikpela bilong yumi Jisas Krais, na long em bai i kam bek gen. Tasol taim mipela i tokim yupela long dispela tok bilong Krais, mipela i no bihainim ol stori nating i bin kamap long tingting bilong ol man. Nogat. Long ai bilong mipela yet, mipela i bin lukim lait na strong bilong God i kamap long em, olsem na mipela i tok.” (2 Pita 1:16)
s.purpose: Baibel i no wanpela stori giaman nating. Em wanpela rekot bilong ol manmeri i bin wokabaut long ol trupela ples, ol trupela de, na ol trupela nem. Bihainim ol dispela rot long map, long stret taim — paitim wanpela poin, o paitim ▶ bilong wokabaut long en wanpela step long wanpela taim.
s.ot_kick: ① Olpela Testamen — i go long taim
s.ot_h: Stat long wokim i go inap long kam bek long Jerusalem
s.ot_lead: I no wanpela wokabaut tasol, em i ran bilong stori bilong kisim bek stat long wokim i kam: wokim na pundaun → bikpela tait na Babel → wanpela singaut (Abraham) → graun God i promis → lusim Isip → ples wesan → kisim graun → kingdom → bruk → kalabus → kam bek.
s.je_kick: ② Nupela Testamen — laip bilong Jisas
s.je_h: Stat long Betlehem i go long Jerusalem
s.je_lead: Bihainim laip bilong Jisas olsem ol Gutnius i tokaut, long stret rot — stat long em i kamap long Betlehem, i go long baptais na wok long Galili, i krosim Samaria, i go long diwai kros, kirap bek na go antap long Jerusalem.
s.pa_kick: ③ Nupela Testamen — ol wokabaut bilong Pol
s.pa_h: Stat long Antiok i go inap long ol arere bilong graun — Rom
s.pa_lead: Stat long Pentikos long Jerusalem, olsem wanem gutnius i go ausait long Judia — long Liklik Esia na Yurop i go long namel bilong bikpela kingdom. Makim wanpela bilong faivpela wokabaut (namba wan·tu·tri + wokabaut long sip i go long Rom + bihain long lusim kalabus) na bihainim ol samting bilong Aposel wantaim ol pas ol i raitim long rot.
s.foot: Ol as bilong save · Ol ples i bihainim tok bilong Baibel na stretpela save bilong graun bilong Baibel (wantaim ol nem bilong nau we em i helpim). Ol arere bilong solwara, ol wara na ol raunwara i kam long open data bilong graun (Natural Earth), na ol i mekim isi.
s.contact: Ol askim · tok bek — Salim imel

eden.name: Iden (Wokim · Pundaun)
eden.today: long nau, hap bilong ol wara Taigris na Yufretis
eden.note: Long wanpela graun God i wokim i gutpela tru, sin i kam insait na i brukim rot namel long God na ol manmeri.
events: Sikispela de bilong wokim — “em i gutpela tru”
Manmeri i kamap olsem piksa bilong God
Pundaun, na ranim long Iden
Namba wan promis bilong gutnius — “lain bilong meri bai krungutim het bilong snek”

noah.name: Ararat (Bikpela Tait)
noah.today: Maunten Ararat, long hap is bilong Turki nau
noah.note: God i kotim wanpela graun i pulap long sin, tasol em i lukautim laip long rot bilong wanpela famili.
events: Wanpela graun i pulap long pasin nogut
Bikpela tait, na sip bilong Noa
Kontrak bilong renbo — “bai i no gat bikpela tait gen bilong bagarapim graun”

babel.name: Taua bilong Babel
babel.note: Bilong daunim pasin hambak i laik go antap long heven, God i mekim tok ples bilong ol i paul na i mekim ol manmeri i go nabaut long graun.
events: “Yumi wokim wanpela taun na wanpela taua … na kisim biknem bilong yumi yet”
God i paulim tok ples bilong ol
Ol manmeri i go nabaut long graun (Sinar — bihain Babilon)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Stori bilong Baibel bilong kisim bek i stat long singaut bilong wanpela man.
events: God i singautim Abram long lusim Ur bilong ol Kaldia
“Bai mi mekim yu i kamap bikpela lain tru … olgeta lain manmeri bai kisim blesing long yu”
Long bilip em i lusim as ples bilong em

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: Long rot, i bihainim singaut i go long graun God i promis.
events: Famili bilong Tera i sindaun long Haran
Tera i dai
Long 75 krismas, Abram i lusim ples i go long Kenan

shechem.name: Sekem · Kenan
shechem.note: Long graun God i promis, wanpela famili i kamap na kontrak i go daun long ol lain bihain.
events: Go insait long Kenan, namba wan alta — “bai mi givim dispela graun long lain bilong yu”
Kontrak (Stat 15) · Aisak · Jekop
Twelpela pikinini man bilong Jekop — as bilong twelpela lain

egypt.name: Isip (Gosen)
egypt.today: Delta bilong wara Nail, Isip nau
egypt.note: Wanpela famili i kamap bikpela lain — na bihain i kamap lain wokboi nating.
events: Ol i salim Josep i go, tasol em i kamap bikman bilong bosim Isip
Olgeta famili bilong Jekop i kam daun bilong abrusim bikpela hangre
Lain Israel i kamap bikpela, na ol i mekim ol i kamap wokboi nating

sinai.name: Maunten Sainai
sinai.note: Bikpela wok bilong kisim bek long Olpela Testamen — ol wokboi nating i kamap ol manmeri bilong God yet.
events: Tenpela bikpela hevi na pikinini sipsip bilong Pasova
Retsi i bruk na ol i wokabaut i go hapsait
Tenpela Lo, ol Lo, haus sel holi na ol ofa

kadesh.name: Kades (ples wesan)
kadesh.note: Pasin bilong no bilip i mekim wanpela lain i lusim graun — tasol God i stap wantaim ol yet.
events: Twelpela man bilong lukstil long graun — tasol ol manmeri i no laik bilip
38 krismas long ples wesan — mana, klaut na paia
Long ples stret bilong Moap, las autim tok bilong Moses (Lo)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Long pinis ol i go insait na kisim graun God i promis.
events: Wara Jordan i bruk na ol manmeri i wokabaut i go hapsait
Ol banis bilong Jeriko i pundaun
Kisim graun Kenan na tilim graun long ol lain

shiloh.name: Sailo (ol Hetman)
shiloh.note: I no gat king, na olgeta man i mekim long laik bilong ol yet — ol i nidim wanpela trupela king.
events: Ol i sanapim haus sel holi long Sailo
Wil bilong sin–hevi–kisim bek (Debora, Gideon, Samson)
Rut — pasin bilong stap gut long taim nogut, insait long lain bilong Devit

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem · Kingdom Wanbel
jerusalem.note: Gutpela taim tru bilong Israel — na promis bilong wanpela king i stap oltaim.
events: Sol namba wan king, na bihain Devit na Goliat
Kontrak bilong Devit — “sia king bilong yu bai i stap oltaim” (2 Samuel 7)
Solomon i wokim tempel long Jerusalem

samaria.name: Samaria · Kingdom i Bruk
samaria.note: Kingdom i bruk na i go daun taim ol profet i singaut.
events: Bihain long Solomon, i bruk long Juda na Israel
Lotu long giaman god i kamap gen na gen
Ilaija, Aisaia, Jeremaia i singaut “kam bek” — na autim tok long Mesaia bai i kam

nineveh.name: Niniva (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Long sakim olgeta tok lukaut, hap not i pundaun pastaim.
events: Niniva, biktaun bilong Asiria
Kingdom bilong hap not i pundaun long Asiria (722 BC)
Ol i salim Jona i go long Niniva

babylon.name: Babilon
babylon.note: Tudak tru bilong olgeta — tasol promis bilong stretim gen i stap yet.
events: Jerusalem i pundaun, tempel i kuk (586 BC)
Ol i kisim Juda i go kalabus long Babilon
Daniel na Esekiel — bilip na ol driman long kalabus

susa.name: Susa (Persia)
susa.note: Maski long namel bilong wanpela bikpela kingdom bilong giaman lotu, God i lukautim ol manmeri bilong em.
events: Persia i daunim Babilon
Esta i kisim bek ol Juda long bagarap
Nehemia i beten long ai bilong king na ol i salim em i go

return.name: Kam Bek long Jerusalem
return.note: Ol i kam bek na wokim gen — tasol i no gat king i kam. Ol i wetim Mesaia.
events: Tripela hap lain i kam bek long tok bilong Sairus (Serubabel 538 · Esra 458 · Nehemia 444)
Wokim gen tempel na stretim gen banis bilong Jerusalem
Malakai — Olpela Testamen i pinis: “Bai mi salim wanpela man bilong autim tok bilong mi”

bethlehem.name: Betlehem
bethlehem.note: Mesaia God i promis i kam long taun bilong Devit — Tok i kamap man.
events: Ol i karim em long Betlehem, taun bilong Devit
Ol ensel i autim tok long ol wasman bilong sipsip
Ol saveman i kam bilong lotu long em

nazareth.name: Nasaret
nazareth.note: God i kamap bikpela olsem wanpela man long wanpela taun nating.
events: Ol i lukautim em long haus bilong wanpela kapenta
Long 12 krismas, em i askim na bekim tok long tempel
Bihain ol i rausim em long haus lotu bilong as ples bilong em

jordan.name: Wara Jordan
jordan.note: Wok bilong em long ai bilong ol manmeri i stat — heven i makim em olsem Pikinini.
events: Jon i baptaisim em
Spirit i kam daun olsem balus — “Dispela em Pikinini bilong mi, mi laikim em tumas”
Em i daunim tripela traim bilong Satan long ples wesan

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Long namba wan mirakel bilong em, em i soim glori bilong em.
events: Em i wanpela man ol i singautim long wanpela marit
Wara i tanim i kamap wain — namba wan mirakel bilong em
Ol disaipel bilong em i bilip long em

sychar.name: Saikar (Samaria)
sychar.note: Rot bilong wok long stat — i go long Jerusalem na i go long Samaria ol i lukim daun long en.
events: Em i klinim tempel long Jerusalem
Long nait, Nikodemus — “Yu mas kamap nupela gen”
Wara bilong laip long wanpela meri bilong Samaria

capernaum.name: Kaperneam
capernaum.note: As ples bilong wok long Galili — singautim, skulim na birua i bung long hia.
events: Em i singautim ol man bilong painim pis na i mekim hia as ples bilong em
Autim tok long maunten — “Ol manmeri i save, ol i stap rabis tru long ol samting bilong God, em ol i ken amamas”
Ol tok piksa bilong kingdom — na birua i kirap i go bikpela

galilee.name: Raunwara Galili
galilee.note: Long strong antap long ol samting bilong graun, em i soim yumi long husat em i stap.
events: “Inap nau. Yu pinis! Yu dai nau!” — em i mekim bikpela win na si i dai
Em i givim kaikai long 5,000 man long faivpela bret na tupela pis
Em i wokabaut antap long wara

caesarea_p.name: Sesaria Filipai
caesarea_p.note: Ol disaipel i kliagut olsem em i Krais, na rot bilong diwai kros i op.
events: Tokaut bilong Pita — “Yu dispela Krais, Pikinini bilong God i gat laip”
Em i tokaut pastaim long dai na kirap bek bilong em
Em i senis na kamap lait long glori long maunten

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Long rot i go antap long Jerusalem, em i painim ol man i lus.
events: Em i opim ai bilong aipas Batimeus
Em i singautim Sakius, man bilong kisim takis
“Pikinini bilong Man i kam bilong painim na kisim bek ol man i lus”

bethany.name: Betani
bethany.note: Klostu long las wik bilong em, em i soim strong antap long dai.
events: Em i kirapim Lasarus long matmat — “Kirap bek, em mi yet. Na laip, em mi yet.”
Maria i welim em bilong redim planim bilong em
Dispela mirakel i strongim tingting bilong ol bilong kilim em i dai

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Antap tru olgeta Baibel i soim rot i go long en — diwai kros, kirap bek, na go antap.
events: Em i go insait wantaim biknem; em i kapsaitim ol tebol long tempel gen
Long Las Kaikai em i wasim lek bilong ol disaipel
Em i dai long diwai kros
Em i kirap bek long de namba tri, na bihain i go antap long heven

antioch.name: Antiok
antioch.note: Sios bilong salim, we wok long ol arapela lain i stat na i kam bek long en.
events: Long beten, Spirit i makim Banabas na Sol
Sios we ol i statim kolim ol bilipman “ol Kristen”
Ples bilong stat bilong namba wan, namba tu na namba tri wokabaut

seleucia.name: Selusia
seleucia.note: Ples sip bilong Antiok — ol i kalap long sip i go long Saiprus.

salamis.name: Salamis (Saiprus)
salamis.note: Namba wan ples long Saiprus — ol i autim tok long ol haus lotu.

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: Ol i soim strong bilong God long ol man i birua long gutnius.
events: Elimas, man bilong posin, i kamap aipas
Sergius Paulus, gavman, i bilip
Stat long hia, “Pol” i go pas

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Wanpela ples sip long Pamfilia — long hia Jon Mak i tanim i go bek.

pantioch.name: Antiok bilong Pisidia
pantioch.note: Gutnius i op i go long ol arapela lain.
events: Wanpela longpela tok bilong stori bilong kisim bek long haus lotu
Planti bilong ol arapela lain i amamas na kisim tok
Birua i rausim ol i go

iconium.name: Ikoniam
iconium.note: Planti i bilip, tasol birua na pait i mekim ol i go het.

lystra.name: Listra
lystra.note: Ol i tingim em olsem wanpela god, na bihain ol i tromoi ston long em.
events: Em i oraitim wanpela man i gat lek nogut stat long taim mama i karim em
Ol manmeri i traim mekim ofa long tupela olsem ol i god
Ol i tromoi ston na larim em olsem em i dai, tasol em i kirap

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Planti i kamap disaipel; ol i wokabaut i go bek long strongim ol sios.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Ples bilong senis, we gutnius i go pastaim long Yurop.
events: Wanpela driman long wanpela man bilong Masedonia
“Kam hapsait long Masedonia na helpim mipela”
Wantu ol i brukim solwara i go long Yurop

philippi.name: Filipai
philippi.note: Namba wan sios long Yurop — gutnius i win maski long kalabus.
events: Lidia, meri bilong salim laplap kala purpel, i bilip
Wanpela wokmeri nating i gat spirit bilong tok profet i kisim fri
Ol song long biknait, guria, na famili bilong wasman kalabus i kisim bek

thess.name: Tesalonaika
thess.note: Tok i seksekim biktaun na birua i kamap strong.
events: Em i toktok long haus lotu long tripela Sabat
“Ol dispela manmeri i tanim graun i go antap i kam daun”
Long nait ol i lusim ples hait

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Ol “gutpela tingting” manmeri i skelim tok long ol yet.
events: Ol i kisim tok wantaim amamas
Olgeta de ol i skelim Buk bilong God bilong sekim en
Planti i kamap bilipman

athens.name: Atens
athens.note: Long biktaun bilong ol saveman, em i autim tok long “god ol i no save long en”.
events: Bel bilong em i kirap long lukim wanpela biktaun i pulap long ol giaman god
Long Areopagus em i autim tok long God bilong wokim na long kirap bek
Ol i tok bilas long em, tasol sampela i bilip

corinth.name: Korin
corinth.note: Em i stap wanpela yia na hap, na planim wanpela sios long wanpela biktaun i pulap long pasin nogut.
events: Em i wokim ol haus sel wantaim Akwila na Prisila
“No ken pret … long wanem mi stap wantaim yu”
Planti manmeri bilong Korin i bilip na kisim baptais

ephesus.name: Efesus
ephesus.note: Namel bilong namba tri wokabaut — tok i go nabaut long olgeta Esia.
events: Skulim ol manmeri olgeta de long tupela yia long haus bilong Tiranus
Ol i kukim ol buk bilong posin; ol strongpela wok i kamap
Dimitrius, man bilong wokim silva, i kirapim wanpela bikpela paul

miletus.name: Miletus
miletus.note: Wanpela tok gudbai wantaim aiwara long ol hetman bilong sios long Efesus.
events: “Lukautim sios em i baim long blut bilong em yet”
Ol hetman i krai, long ol i save bai ol i no lukim em gen

caesarea.name: Sesaria
caesarea.note: Inap tupela yia em i sanap strong long gutnius long ai bilong ol gavman na wanpela king.
events: Ol kot long ai bilong tupela gavman, Filiks na Festus
Tok bilong lukautim em yet long ai bilong King Agripa
“Mi laik kot i go long Sisa” — na i go long Rom

jerusalem.name: Jerusalem
jerusalem.note: Ol i holimpasim em long tempel, na rot bilong em olsem kalabusman i stat.
events: Ol bikpela lain manmeri i holimpasim em long tempel
Em i sanap strong long em yet long ai bilong kaunsil bilong ol Juda
Olsem wanpela sitisen bilong Rom, ol i salim em wantaim ol soldia i go long Sesaria

myra.name: Maira
myra.note: Ol i go long narapela sip bilong Aleksandria i laik go long Rom.

fairhaven.name: Ol Naispela Wap (Krit)
fairhaven.note: Ol i no harim tok lukaut bilong Pol long pasim wokabaut long sip.

crete.name: Krit
crete.note: Bihain long ol i lusim em long kalabus, dispela ailan we em i lusim Taitus long stretim ol sios.
events: Em i lusim Taitus long makim ol hetman bilong sios long olgeta taun
Em i tok ol hetman i mas i stap klin na gat gutpela pasin
Em i raitim pas i go long Taitus

malta.name: Molta
malta.note: Namel long bikpela win na bagarap bilong sip, promis bilong God i stap strong.
events: Bikpela win “not-is” i bagarapim sip, tasol olgeta 276 man i abrus long dai
Wanpela snek i gat posin i kaikaim em, tasol em i no kisim bagarap
Em i oraitim ol sikman bilong ailan

syracuse.name: Sirakius
syracuse.note: Ol i stap tripela de long Sisili.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Ol i kamap long Itali na ol wanbilip i bungim ol.

rome.name: Rom
rome.book: Aposel 28 · Ol Pas long Kalabus · 2 Timoti
rome.note: Gutnius i kamap long namel bilong bikpela kingdom long pinis — i no wanpela pinis, em wanpela nupela stat.
events: Tupela yia em i stap kalabus long haus, na em i autim tok long kingdom wantaim strong
Long hia em i raitim Ol Pas long Kalabus (Efesus · Filipai · Kolosi · Filemon)
Bihain ol i kalabusim em gen, em i raitim 2 Timoti na ol i kilim em i dai bilong bilip — “Mi pait gut long gutpela pait, mi pinisim resis”

journeys.rome: Namba foa wokabaut · i go long Rom
journeys.j5: Namba faiv wokabaut · bihain long lusim kalabus
